SELECT epoch_ns(ts) FROM timestamps WHERE ts >= timestamp '2021-01-01' AND ts <= timestamp '2022-01-01';
SELECT ts, epoch_ns(ts) FROM timestamps ORDER BY ts DESC;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, related_ts TIMESTAMP);
SELECT ad.id, epoch_ns(ad.related_ts) AS ns_since_epoch FROM additional_data ad JOIN timestamps t ON ad.related_ts = t.ts;
SELECT t.ts, epoch_ns(t.ts) + 1000000 AS adjusted_ns FROM timestamps t WHERE epoch_ns(t.ts) < 0;
WITH ts_data AS (SELECT ts, epoch_ns(ts) AS ns FROM timestamps) SELECT AVG(ns) FROM ts_data;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timestamps) AS total_records, (SELECT SUM(epoch_ns(ts)) FROM timestamps) AS total_ns;
SELECT CASE WHEN epoch_ns(timestamp '2021-08-03 11:59:44.123456') > 0 THEN 'valid' ELSE 'invalid' END AS check_validity;
SELECT epoch_ns(ts), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_data) AS related_count FROM timestamps t;
SELECT t.ts, epoch_ns(t.ts) AS epoch_ns, (epoch_ns(t.ts) - epoch_ns(timestamp '1970-01-01 00:00:00')) / 1000000 AS ms_since_epoch FROM timestamps t WHERE ts < timestamp '2025-01-01';
